title: Port Afrique
writer: Frank Partos, John Cresswell, Bernard Victor Dryer
actors: Pier Angeli, Eugene Deckers, Pat O'Meara
plot: Rip Reardon, ex-Army flier, returns to his home in French Morocco and finds his wife dead, and he suspects she has been murdered. Police Colonel Moussac insists she committed suicide. Rip begins to suspect not only his friends but...
